expectations.text: Closes `files.csv` after the exploration file ledger is complete
Closes `sources.md` after the research source ledger is complete
Keeps `open-questions` open only while unresolved questions remain and closes it once every entry is finalized
Places the Phase 7 task graph YAML in the `phase:task-graph` issue body rather than a separate artifact subissue

eval_feedback.overall: Deterministic text grading against the eval expectations.
